flow.name: slack-travel-flow
flow.doc:name: Slack Travel Flow
flow.doc:description: Handles Slack /travel slash command: ACKs immediately, processes asynchronously

set-variable.doc:name: Set responseUrl
set-variable.doc:description: Stores the Slack response_url callback for the async reply

async.doc:name: Async Scope
async.doc:description: Runs broker processing off the request thread

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { response_type: "ephemeral", text: "Searching for your travel options..." }

sub-flow.name: sf-processTravelRequestAsync
sub-flow.doc:name: Process Travel Request Async
sub-flow.doc:description: Calls the broker and posts the result to the Slack response_url

try.doc:description: Sends a fallback Slack message if the broker call fails

http:request.doc:name: Send Request to Broker
http:request.doc:description: Calls the Travel Agent Broker (A2A JSON-RPC 2.0)

http:request.doc:name: Send Response to Slack
http:request.doc:description: Posts the broker result to the Slack response_url callback

on-error-continue.doc:name: On Error Continue
on-error-continue.doc:description: Notifies the Slack user when the broker is unreachable

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { response_type: "in_channel", text: "Sorry, the travel agent could not be reached. Please try again." }

http:request.doc:name: Fallback Response to Slack
http:request.doc:description: Posts the fallback error message to the Slack response_url

sub-flow.name: sf-buildBrokerJsonRpcRequest
sub-flow.doc:name: Build Broker JSON-RPC Request
sub-flow.doc:description: Builds the A2A JSON-RPC 2.0 message/send body from the Slack request text

sub-flow.name: sf-buildSlackResponseJson
sub-flow.doc:name: Build Slack Response JSON
sub-flow.doc:description: Extracts the broker answer (completed artifact or input-required message) into a Slack message

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var artifacts = payload.result.artifacts default [] var artText = if (sizeOf(artifacts) > 0) artifacts[0].parts[0].text else null var msgText = payload.result.status.message.parts[0].text default null --- { response_type: "in_channel", text: (artText default msgText default "No response from the travel agent.") }
